name: vllm-models
description: A local vLLM server (OpenAI-compatible). Point it at your vLLM endpoint; capabilities are model-dependent.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: vLLM Base URL
x-meta.help: The OpenAI-compatible base URL of your vLLM server (e.g. http://localhost:8000).

x-meta.label: Default Model
x-meta.help: The model id served by your vLLM deployment.
